focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
【金融新闻】从“会说”到“会想会做” 具身机器人正加速“进化”
【中国新闻】哈萨克斯坦暂时下调原油产量
【世界新闻】India activist ends hunger strike after 26 days

items.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
items.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

items.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
items.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

items.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
items.summary: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate che

items.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
items.summary: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes qu

items.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
items.summary: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

items.title: 从“会说”到“会想会做” 具身机器人正加速“进化”
items.summary: 陪聊天只是第一步

items.title: 今年上半年我国汽车出口超6000亿元 同比增长48.3%
items.summary: 今年上半年，我国汽车出口6358.2亿元，同比增长48.3%，销往全球210多个国家和地区。其中，新能源汽车出口3606.8亿元，同比增长68.7%。

items.title: 搭平台建生态促协同 浙江系统推进制造业“智改数转”
items.summary: 中新网杭州7月23日电(蓝伊旎)7月23日，制造业数字化转型促进中心“深度行”(浙江站)暨浙江省“十链百场万企”系列对接活动之“智改数转”专场在杭州举行，旨在推动供需两端精准对接，助力企业破解转型痛点。

items.title: 福州举办台青创业“扶摇计划”分享会
items.summary: 中新网福州7月23日电 (郑江洛)23日，国家税务总局福州市晋安区税务局联合共青团福州市委员会，携手台江区委台办、晋安区医保局等多家单位，在福州市台胞台企交流服务中心举办2026年度福州市台湾青年创业“扶摇计划”配套活动企业提质升级分享会。

items.title: 上半年贺州外贸进出口同比增长85% 外向型经济活力迸发
items.summary: 中新网贺州7月23日电(黄筱珂 赵锦晟 叶剑青)贺州海关23日介绍，2026年上半年，该市外贸进出口总额达15.8亿元(人民币，下同)，同比(下同)增长85%，增速位居广西前列。其中，货物出口额13.6亿元，增长170.4%，展现出强劲的外向型经济活力。

items.title: 哈萨克斯坦暂时下调原油产量
items.summary: 中新社阿斯塔纳7月23日电 (记者 单璐)哈萨克斯坦能源部23日表示，受里海管道联盟海上码头暂停原油装船作业影响，哈国内石油企业已暂时下调原油产量。

items.title: 王毅会见乌兹别克斯坦外长赛义多夫
items.summary: 图源：外交部网站 当地时间2026年7月23日晚，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在吉尔吉斯斯坦出席上海合作组织外长会前会见乌兹别克斯坦外长赛义多夫。

items.title: 王毅会见白俄罗斯外长雷任科夫
items.summary: 图源：外交部网站 当地时间2026年7月23日晚，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在吉尔吉斯斯坦出席上海合作组织外长会前会见白俄罗斯外长雷任科夫。

items.title: 在两公里长的“跑道”上追赶光速 大国重器HIAF背后的十六年攻坚
items.summary: 在两公里长的“跑道”上追赶光速

items.title: 特朗普：美国将用伊朗资金“赔偿”受损船只和货物
items.summary: 中新网7月24日电 据彭博社报道，当地时间23日，美国总统特朗普在社交媒体发文称，美国将用其控制的伊朗资金“赔偿”因伊方袭击受损的船只和货物。

items.title: India activist ends hunger strike after 26 days
items.summary: Sonam Wangchuk, a supporter of youth-led protesters demanding education reforms, says he wants to avert "possible violence".

items.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
items.summary: As major tech companies race to capitalize on a new wave of AI technology, investors wonder when financial benefits will appear.

items.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
items.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

items.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
items.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.
